creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
John, I guess timp87 means the fix to detect the clang/pthread issue mentioned on the squid-cache mailing list.
http://www.squid-cache.org/mail-archive/squid-users/201402/0338.html

I haven't found the snapshot archive with the patch on the squid-cache ftp's and also not hint via the bazaar webinterface.

I will spend some time this evening, perhaps I can identify the fix by comparing squid-3.3 against squid-3.4.
